effibench_x_runs_detail: Repository cloned; pip install -e OK; HF dataset EffiBench/effibench-x loads (623 problems). Full Docker evaluate pipeline not run end-to-end.
profiling_available_detail: Canonical solutions include runtime/memory in dataset JSON; live profiling requires EffiBench Docker sandbox.
frozen_detector_reusable_detail: Detector executes unchanged but requires GraphTraversal(graph,start,visit_fn) and BfsDfsTask from INVERT task JSON. Native EffiBench solutions do not satisfy this contract; prototype abstains with no_graph_traversal_class.
prompt_note: Canonical EffiBench solutions are not prompt-generated. A new external generation study could avoid BFS/DFS naming but is a separate experiment.
main_blocker: Representation mismatch: EffiBench competitive-programming Python solutions (stdin/stdout, class Solution) are incompatible with the frozen INVERT Class D GraphTraversal+visit_fn harness and exact BfsDfsTask order templates without a substantial external adapter and new generation run.
